prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: IGE-NPT-BWSBTK-3PC-LG-BLCK-2 Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: 3pc Drop Point Throwing Knife Set Black with Silver Blade Martial Art Set Description: Find your inner ninja with the 3pc Drop Point Throwing Knives. With these throwing knives, you can enjoy learning the skill and technique of knife throwing.

Design

These knives are designed and weighted so that they can be thrown effectively. These Throwing knives feature an ergonomically designed handle, great for learning proper holds and releases.

Features

The 3pc Throwing Knife Martial Arts Set comes with a nylon carrying case and three sharpened throwing knives, ready for use right out of the box.

Throwing knives can be a fun skill to learn. Impress friends and family with pin point accuracy and throwing technique. Search Terms: throwing knives carrying case black knives martial arts ninja knives Features: - Material: 440 Stainless Steel - Length: 6.5 Inch - Sleek and Lightweight - Black Nylon Sheath Included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 3-pc 6.5in Black Throwing Knife Set

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical 3-pk 6.5 in Black Throwing Knives

anthropic.title_differentiation: Drop Point Design, 440 Stainless Steel, Martial Arts, Nylon Carrying Case Included, Lightweight And Ergonomic

openai.title_differentiation: 440 Stainless Steel, Lightweight Balance, Ergonomic Grip, 65 Inch, Nylon Sheath Included, Sharpened Blades
